summary: Added 'giveaway list' (GET /giveaway) and 'giveaway show <id>' (GET /giveaway/:id); scaffolded 'giveaway enter <id>' which refuses live execution and documents the missing capture.
reason: Goodreads Giveaways surface was absent. list/show are confirmed GET pages; the enter-giveaway POST body/CSRF shape was not captured live, so enter is dry-run-only until a real submission is captured.
